optional_parameters.name: cuisine
optional_parameters.description: Limit to a specific cuisine. Cooks can enter anything free-form, but the few dozen preconfigured values are Afghan,African,American,American-South,Asian,Australian,Brazilian,Cajun,Canadian,Caribbean,Chinese,Croatian,Cuban,Dessert,Eastern European,English,French,German,Greek,Hawaiian,Hungarian,India,Indian,Irish,Italian,Japanese,Jewish,Korean,Latin,Mediterranean,Mexican,Middle Eastern,Moroccan,Polish,Russian,Scandanavian,Seafood,Southern,Southwestern,Spanish,Tex-Mex,Thai,Vegan,Vegetarian,Vietnamese.

optional_parameters.name: vegan

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[WATER]
optional_parameters.description:
Water. Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[K]
optional_parameters.description:
Potassium, K. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[SUGAR.added]
optional_parameters.description:
Sugars, added. Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[FIBTG]
optional_parameters.description:
Fiber, total dietary. Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[VITK1]
optional_parameters.description:
Vitamin K (phylloquinone). Unit: µg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[THIA]
optional_parameters.description:
Thiamin. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[FOLAC]
optional_parameters.description:
Folic acid. Unit: µg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[SUGAR]
optional_parameters.description:
Sugars, total. Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[VITC]

Vitamin C, total ascorbic acid. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[RIBF]
optional_parameters.description:
Riboflavin. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[CHOCDF.net]
optional_parameters.description:
Carbohydrates (net). Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[CHOCDF]
optional_parameters.description:
Carbohydrate, by difference. Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[VITD]

Vitamin D (D2 + D3). Unit: µg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: ingr
optional_parameters.description: A keyword search parameter to be found in the food name. REQUIRED if 'upc' and 'brand' are not specified. NOT REQUIRED if 'brand' is specified. DO NOT POPULATE if 'upc' is specified.

optional_parameters.name: nutrition-type
optional_parameters.description: Select between cooking and food logging processor.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[FOLDFE]
optional_parameters.description:
Folate, DFE. Unit: µg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[TOCPHA]
optional_parameters.description:
Vitamin E (alpha-tocopherol). Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

Magnesium. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[CHOLE]
optional_parameters.description:
Cholesterol. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[FAT]
optional_parameters.description:
Total lipid (fat). Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[PROCNT]
optional_parameters.description:
Protein. Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[FE]

Iron, Fe. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

optional_parameters.name: category
optional_parameters.description: Categories

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[FATRN]
optional_parameters.description:
Fatty acids, total trans. Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: calories
optional_parameters.description: The format is calories=RANGE where RANGE is replaced by the value in kcal. RANGE is in one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative integer numbers. The + symbol needs to be properly encoded. Examples: “calories=100-300” will return all recipes with which have between 100 and 300 kcal per serving.

optional_parameters.name: upc
optional_parameters.description: Valid UPC, EAN, or PLU code. REQUIRED if neither 'ingr' nor 'brand' are specified. DO NOT POPULATE otherwise.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[VITB6A]
optional_parameters.description:
Vitamin B6. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[FAMS]
optional_parameters.description:
Fatty acids, total monounsaturated. Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[ENERC_KCAL]
optional_parameters.description:
Energy. Unit: kcal. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[FASAT]
optional_parameters.description:
Fatty acids, total saturated. Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[NA]
optional_parameters.description:
Sodium, Na. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[P]
optional_parameters.description:
Phosphorus, P. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[FAPU]
optional_parameters.description:
Fatty acids, total polyunsaturated. Unit: g. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[CA]
optional_parameters.description:
Calcium, Ca. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

For example: nutrients[CA]=50+ means minimum 50mg calcium, where ‘50+’ has to be properly encoded as ‘50%2B’ nutrients[FAT]=30 means maximum 30g fat and nutrients[FE]=5-10 means iron between 5mg and 10mg inclusive

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[VITB12]
optional_parameters.description:
Vitamin B12. Unit: µg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[ZN]
optional_parameters.description:
Zinc, Zn. Unit: mg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.description: A keyword search parameter to be found in the food's brand. REQUIRED if 'ingr' and 'upc' are not specified. NOT REQUIRED if 'ingr' is specified. DO NOT POPULATE if 'upc' is specified.

optional_parameters.name: nutrients[VITA_RAE]

Vitamin A, RAE. Unit: µg. Input the range which is one of MIN+, MIN-MAX or MAX, where MIN and MAX are non-negative floating point numbers.

See calcium for an example for how to fill in the range.

optional_parameters.name: coordinate
optional_parameters.description: Required if location is not provided. coordinate of the location you want to search near by coma separated.

optional_parameters.description: Specify the locale to return the autocomplete suggestions in.

optional_parameters.name: locale
optional_parameters.description: Specify the interface locale; this determines the language of reviews to return.

optional_parameters.name: locale
optional_parameters.description: Specify the locale to return the business information in.

optional_parameters.name: openAt
optional_parameters.description: An integer represending the Unix time in the same timezone of the search location. If specified, it will return business open at the given time. Notice that open_at and open_now cannot be used together.

optional_parameters.name: location
optional_parameters.description: Required if either coordinate is not provided. Specifies the combination of "address, neighborhood, city, state or zip, optional country" to be used when searching for businesses.

optional_parameters.name: price
optional_parameters.description: Pricing levels to filter the search result with: 1 = $, 2 = $$, 3 = $$$, 4 = $$$$. The price filter can be a list of comma delimited pricing levels. For example, "1, 2, 3" will filter the results to show the ones that are $, $$, or $$$.

optional_parameters.name: term
optional_parameters.description: Search term (e.g. "food", "restaurants"). If term isn’t included we search everything. The term keyword also accepts business names such as "Starbucks".

optional_parameters.name: coordinate
optional_parameters.description: Required if location is not provided. coordinate of the location you want to search near by coma separated.

optional_parameters.name: categories
optional_parameters.description: Categories to filter the search results with. See the list of supported categories. The category filter can be a list of comma delimited categories. For example, "bars,french" will filter by Bars and French. The category identifier should be used (for example "discgolf", not "Disc Golf").

optional_parameters.name: sortBy
optional_parameters.description: Sort the results by one of the these modes: best_match, rating, review_count or distance. By default it's best_match. The rating sort is not strictly sorted by the rating value, but by an adjusted rating value that takes into account the number of ratings, similar to a bayesian average. This is so a business with 1 rating of 5 stars doesn’t immediately jump to the top.

optional_parameters.name: radius
optional_parameters.description: Search radius in meters. If the value is too large, a AREA_TOO_LARGE error may be returned. The max value is 40000 meters (25 miles).

optional_parameters.name: term
optional_parameters.description: Search term (e.g. "food", "restaurants"). If term isn’t included we search everything. The term keyword also accepts business names such as "Starbucks".

optional_parameters.name: openNow
optional_parameters.description: Default to false. When set to true, only return the businesses open now. Notice that open_at and open_now cannot be used together.

optional_parameters.name: openAt
optional_parameters.description: An integer represending the Unix time in the same timezone of the search location. If specified, it will return business open at the given time. Notice that open_at and open_now cannot be used together.

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Number of business results to return. By default, it will return 20. Maximum is 50.

optional_parameters.name: offset
optional_parameters.description: Offset the list of returned business results by this amount.

optional_parameters.name: openNow
optional_parameters.description: Default to false. When set to true, only return the businesses open now. Notice that open_at and open_now cannot be used together.

optional_parameters.name: attributes
optional_parameters.description: Additional filters to restrict search results. Possible values are: hot_and_new, request_a_quote, waitlist_reservation, cashback, deals, gender_neutral_restrooms

required_parameters.name: transactionType

required_parameters.name: name
required_parameters.description: The name of the business. Maximum length is 64; only digits, letters, spaces, and !#$%&+,­./:?@'are allowed.

required_parameters.name: city
required_parameters.description: The city of the business. Maximum length is 64; only digits, letters, spaces, and ­’.() are allowed.

required_parameters.name: state
required_parameters.description: The ISO 3166-2 (with a few exceptions) state code of this business. Maximum length is 3.

required_parameters.name: country
required_parameters.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of this business. Maximum length is 2.

required_parameters.name: city
required_parameters.description: The city of the business. Maximum length is 64; only digits, letters, spaces, and ­’.() are allowed.

required_parameters.name: state
required_parameters.description: The ISO 3166-2 (with a few exceptions) state code of this business. Maximum length is 3.

optional_parameters.name: address1
optional_parameters.description: The first line of the business’s address. Maximum length is 64; only digits, letters, spaces, and ­’/#&,.: are allowed.

optional_parameters.name: address2
optional_parameters.description: The second line of the business’s address. Maximum length is 64; only digits, letters, spaces, and ­’/#&,.: are allowed.

optional_parameters.name: address3
optional_parameters.description: The third line of the business’s address. Maximum length is 64; only digits, letters, spaces, and ­’/#&,.: are allowed.

optional_parameters.name: coordinates
optional_parameters.description: The location you want to search nearby.

optional_parameters.name: phone
optional_parameters.description: The phone number of the business which can be submitted as (a) locally ­formatted with digits only (e.g., 016703080) or (b) internationally­ formatted with a leading + sign and digits only after (+35316703080). Maximum length is 32.

optional_parameters.name: postalCode
optional_parameters.description: The postal code of the business. Maximum length is 12.

optional_parameters.name: yelpBusinessId
optional_parameters.description: Unique Yelp identifier of the business if available. Used as a hint when finding a matching business.

optional_parameters.name: coordinates
optional_parameters.description: The location you want to search nearby.

optional_parameters.description: Specify the locale to return the autocomplete suggestions in.

optional_parameters.description: Offset the list of returned business results by this amount.

optional_parameters.name: limit
optional_parameters.description: Number of business results to return. By default, it will return 20. Maximum is 50.

optional_parameters.name: sortBy
optional_parameters.description: Sort by either descending or ascending order. By default, it returns results in descending order. Possible values are: desc, asc

optional_parameters.name: sortOn
optional_parameters.description: Sort on popularity or time start. By default, sorts on popularity. Possible values are: popularity, time_start
